title: Abbreviations — Expand or Keep for the Dietetics Reader
brief: For each abbreviation, decide whether you should KEEP it (the reader will recognise it) or EXPAND it (the reader is non-specialist or lay).

items.rationale: Universal between dietetics and clinical professionals.
Patients should see the full screening tool name.

items.context: Writing to a community fitness trainer
items.rationale: Lay audience benefits from the explicit phrase.
